full_name: Aluminum Alloy, Sheet and Plate, 4.4Cu-1.5Mg-0.60Mn (2024; -T3 Flat Sheet, -T351 Plate), Solution Heat Treated
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: 2024 aluminum alloy sheet and plate, solution heat treated (T3/T351 tempers), for aerospace structural applications.

chemical_composition.note: Limiting composition of 2024 aluminum as widely published by independent sources (Aluminum Association, MatWeb); values in wt%.

mechanical_properties.note: Typical room-temperature properties in the -T3 temper, from independent datasheets.

license_note: Alloy composition/property data for 2024 aluminum is widely published by independent free sources (Aluminum Association, MatWeb, ASM). Not reproduced from the copyrighted AMS document; AMS 4037 designation used only as an identifier.
